{{Quote|I admired you once, Bey. I thought you were the best of us.|[[Klin-Fa Gi]]|<ref name="Emissary of the Void">"[[Emissary of the Void]]"</ref>}}
'''Bey Gandan''' was a young [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who trained in [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]’s [[New Jedi Order]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Wow. You have the most amazing mental image of yourself. Too bad it has nothing to do with reality.|[[Uldir Lochett]]|<ref name="Emissary of the Void" />}}
Bey Gandan [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] alongside [[Yabeley]] and [[Klin-Fa Gi]], having a crush on the latter, as did Yabeley. He was very jealous of Yabeley, which led to his fall to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]]. The trio traveled to [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]] to investigate the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] presence on the world. They were captured by the Yuuzhan Vong, whom [[Torture/Legends|tortured]] Yabeley to death in an interrogation attempt. Gandan and Gi were enslaved aboard a [[Shaper caste|Shapers']] [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]], from whence they escaped with a [[qahsa]] containing information on a Shaper project to exterminate the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].

Gandan was recaptured by the Yuuzhan Vong, but Gi avoided capture on [[Bonadan/Legends|Bonadan]] with the help of [[Uldir Lochett]]. Lochett helped Gi return to Wayland to recover the key to the qahsa and then helped her rescue Gandan. He had been corrupted by the Yuuzhan Vong, acting as the delivery agent of a Shaper-created virus that would infect the [[Alazhi/Legends|alazhi]] trees of [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]]. Any [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] made from the infected plants would eventually kill those who used it. Through a Shaper's [[villip]] implanted in his skull, Gandan could receive orders from the Shapers [[Tsaa Qalu]] and [[Viith Yalu]]. Planning to eradicate the Yuuzhan Vong himself after delivering the virus, Gandan tricked Lochett and Gi into taking him to Thyferra aboard the ''[[No Luck Required]]''. On Thyferra they figured out Gandan's treachery and after a [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]] with Klin-Fa, Lochett threw Gi's lightsaber, which she had lost during the duel, cutting Gandan from shoulder to hip in the process.

==Appearances==
